LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS WEST COAST POWDER COATING, INC. AND ALLEN J. COSTA'S DEMURRERS TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE NEGLIGENCE AND PRODUCTS LIABILITY CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MAY NOT RECOVER IN TORT FOR THE BREACH OF DUTIES THAT MERELY RESTATE CONTRACTUAL OBLIGATIONS. ALSO, PLAINTIFF CANNOT BRING A PRODUCTS LIABILITY CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE ITS ALLEGED LOSSES ARE MERELY ECONOMIC. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE BREACH OF CONTRACT CAUSE OF ACTION. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER). JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS WEST COAST POWDER COATING, INC. AND ALLEN J. COSTA'S DEMURRERS TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE NEGLIGENCE AND PRODUCTS LIABILITY CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MAY NOT RECOVER IN TORT FOR THE BREACH OF DUTIES THAT MERELY RESTATE CONTRACTUAL OBLIGATIONS. ALSO, PLAINTIFF CANNOT BRING A PRODUCTS LIABILITY CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE ITS ALLEGED LOSSES ARE MERELY ECONOMIC. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE BREACH OF CONTRACT CAUSE OF ACTION. (Moving party to prepare a proposed form of order.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
